info.description: REST API for the Content Control Center application.
info.title: Content Control Center API

get.description: Returns all campaign types with their phases ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new user-defined campaign type without phases.

get.description: Returns a single campaign type with its phases by ID.

put.description: Updates name, label, and description of a user-created campaign type. System types cannot be modified.

delete.description: Deletes a user-created campaign type and all its phases. System types cannot be deleted.

post.description: Creates a new user-defined campaign type by deep-copying an existing type and all its phases.

parameters.description: Name and label for the clone
parameters.name: body

post.description: Adds a new phase to a campaign type.

put.description: Updates a phase within a campaign type.

delete.description: Deletes a phase from a campaign type.

get.description: Returns all campaigns ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new campaign. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns all posts for the given campaign ID, with campaign, platform, and assets hydrated.
Returns a single campaign by Sqid.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing campaign.

post.description:
Calls the AI content plan flow and streams progress via Server-Sent Events.
Each step emits an SSE event of type "step" with payload {"step":"<name>","status":"done"}.
On success a final "complete" event carries the full ContentPlanResponse payload.
On failure an "error" event carries {"message":"<text>","code":<http_code>}.

200.description: SSE stream: step / complete / error events

get.description: Returns all content bank assets ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new content bank asset. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

Accepts one or more `.md` (max 10 MB) or `.pdf` (max 50 MB) files. Markdown files are converted to BlockNote JSON synchronously; PDFs are uploaded to object storage and processed asynchronously (text extraction, page-aware chunking, embedding, thumbnail). Files are processed independently — one failure does not block others.

get.description: Returns a single content bank asset by Sqid.

put.description: Updates title and content of an existing asset.

delete.description: Deletes a content bank asset by Sqid.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user derived from the active session cookie.
Returns the health status of the service and database connectivity.

post.description: Uploads an image file to object storage and returns its public URL.

get.description: Returns all platforms ordered by creation date.
Returns a single platform by Sqid.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing platform.

get.description: Returns all posts ordered by creation date, with campaign, platform, and assets hydrated.

post.description: Creates a new post. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns a single post by Sqid with campaign, platform, and assets hydrated.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing post.

post.description: Authenticates a user by email and password, sets a session cookie, and returns the created session.

delete.description: Invalidates the current session and clears the session cookie.

get.description: Returns a single setting by key. Authentication is not required when setup_complete is false, allowing the frontend to check setup status before any user exists.

put.description: Creates or updates a setting by key.

get.description: Returns all tags ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new tag. The created_by field is set from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns a single tag by Sqid.

put.description: Updates name and color of an existing tag.

get.description: Returns all users ordered by creation date.

post.description: Creates a new user. Open (no auth required) while setup_complete=false; requires authentication once setup is complete.

get.description: Returns a single user by Sqid.

put.description: Updates name and/or email of an existing user.

password.description: Password is optional on update; when provided it must be at least 8 characters.

thumbnail_url.description:
ThumbnailURL is a transient public URL rendered from ThumbnailS3Key by
the handler layer before serialization. Not persisted.

campaign.description: Hydrated relations — not stored in the database.
